name: Build Desktop Versions
on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  release:
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [windows-latest, macos-latest, ubuntu-latest]

    steps:
      - name: Check out Git repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22  # Updated to meet your package requirements

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build Web Project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Build Desktop App
        uses: samuelmeuli/action-electron-builder@v1
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          # Points the builder to the electron folder
          package_root: "electron" 
          release: true
          # This bypasses the "npx canceled" error
          args: "--config electron-builder.config.json"
